name: codex-autoresearch
description: Current-chat and current-directory entrypoint for codex-autoresearch long tasks, including slash, natural-language, and explicit skill triggers inside Codex chat.

interface.shortDescription: Use codex-autoresearch from the current Codex chat through slash, natural language, or explicit skill triggers.
interface.longDescription: Start or resume codex-autoresearch tasks from the current Codex chat without manually thinking about shell commands, workdir, state-dir, or session ids. The plugin treats the latest 8 turns of the current chat as the intent source, defaults to the current directory, routes through MCP, and decides whether to continue the latest current-directory codex-autoresearch task, start a new one, or run an explicit repository skill.
defaultPrompt: 用 codex-autoresearch 把我们刚才聊的需求跑成一个永动机任务。
用 research skill 处理我们当前聊天刚才讨论的需求。
